(tabs)/chat.title: Chat
(tabs)/chat.description: Try: go to profile, tap settings... (text-input), Send (button), FlatList (list)

(tabs)/index.title: Home
(tabs)/index.description: Street Address (text-input), City (text-input), Zip / Postal Code (text-input), Express Delivery (switch), Gift Wrapping (switch), Advanced Shipping Options (button), name (button), category (button)

(tabs)/settings.title: Settings
(tabs)/settings.description: Notifications (button), › (button), Appearance (button), Language (button), About (button), Privacy Policy (button)

(tabs)/two.title: Profile
(tabs)/two.description: Edit Profile (button), › (button), Favorites (button), Order History (button), Saved Addresses (button)

about.title: About
about.description: About ShopApp, Version 1.0.0, ShopApp is a demo application showcasing the integration of AI agents with Expo Router. This app demonstrates how an AI assistant can navigate between screens, fill forms, tap buttons, and interact with your React Native app's live UI., Built with @mobileai/react-native — the drop-in AI agent for React Native apps., Technologies, Expo Router (File-based routing)

edit-profile.title: Edit Profile
edit-profile.description: Full Name (text-input), Email (text-input), Phone (text-input), Bio (text-input), Save Changes (button)

invite-friends.description: Friend's email address (text-input), Copy Code (button), ✓ Invite Sent! (button), Send Invite (button), 📤 Share via Other Apps (button)

item/[id].title: Item Details
item/[id].description: Add to Wishlist (switch), View Reviews & Questions (button), › (button), Add to Cart (button)

item-reviews/[id].title: Reviews
item-reviews/[id].description: Type your question about this product... (text-input), Price Drop Alerts (switch), Notify on New Reviews (switch), ✍️ Write a Review (button), Submit Question (button)

language.title: Language
language.description: English (button), Arabic (button), Spanish (button), French (button), German (button), Japanese (button)

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Push Notifications (switch), Email Notifications (switch), SMS Notifications (switch), Deal Alerts (switch)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Privacy Policy, Last updated: March 2026, Data Collection, This demo app does not collect or store any personal data. All interactions with the AI agent are processed in real-time and are not persisted., AI Agent, The AI agent reads your screen's UI hierarchy to understand context and perform actions. It does not access any data marked with content masking or security gating.

product/[id].title: Product Details
product/[id].description: Product not found, name, category, $, price, description

review-thanks/[id].description: View Rewards Program (button), Back to Reviews (button)

rewards.description: New Reward Opportunities (switch), Weekly Exclusive Deals (switch), Milestone Alerts (switch), 👥 (button), Invite Friends (button), Earn 100 points per referral (button), › (button)

write-review/[id].description: Summarize your experience (text-input), What did you like or dislike? How do you use this product? (text-input), ★ (button), ☆ (button), 👍 Yes (button), 👎 No (button), Submit Review (button)
